scripts.benchmark:gates: pnpm --filter @korajs/store test:benchmarks && pnpm --filter @korajs/merge test:benchmarks && pnpm --filter @korajs/sync test:benchmarks
scripts.test:release-gate: pnpm test:production-path && pnpm test:sync-reconnect && pnpm test:chaos:real-path && pnpm benchmark:gates
scripts.test:pre-release: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:release-gate && pnpm --filter kora-e2e test:e2e:install && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:pre-release:core: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm test:release-gate
